description: Bloom Protocol — Available Playbooks by Tribe. All playbooks include context chain, memory injection, and bloom_reflect.

playbooks.title: Launch Committee v1
playbooks.note: 4-role project validation. Copy into your agent — runs entirely on your machine.

playbooks.title: Customer Role-Play v1
playbooks.note: AI simulates your target customers to test your value proposition.

playbooks.title: The Council v1
playbooks.note: History's wisdom for your crossroads. AI finds who lived through your struggle — only for verified humans.

playbooks.title: Zen v1
playbooks.note: Guided reflection before big decisions. Your agent helps you hear your own voice — only for verified humans.
